# Brock Visual TimeTable

> A free visual timetable generator for Brock University students.

Brock Visual TimeTable helps students generate conflict-free course schedules,
compare timetable options, block off unavailable times, pin required classes,
and export selected schedules to a calendar.

Primary audience:
- Brock University students planning undergraduate or graduate course schedules
- First-year students learning Brock course registration
- Contributors working on the timetable generator

Core capabilities:
- Search Brock course offerings by timetable type and session
- Generate timetable options from lectures, labs, tutorials, and seminars
- Filter out schedules with class time conflicts
- Block unavailable times and regenerate around them when possible
- Pin preferred class components across generated options
- Sort timetable options by class days or waiting time
- Export selected schedules to calendar files

Routes:
- https://brocktimetable.com/ - Timetable generator
- https://brocktimetable.com/guide - Brock course registration guide

Important terms:
- Timetable type: UG for undergraduate, plus other timetable categories supported by the app
- Session: FW for fall/winter, plus other sessions supported by the app
- Duration: Brock term duration code, such as D1, D2, or D3
- Component: a lecture, lab, tutorial, seminar, or other scheduled course part

Repository docs:
- https://github.com/BrockTimetable/BrockVisualTimetable - source repository
- https://github.com/BrockTimetable/BrockVisualTimetable/blob/master/README.md - project overview and setup
- https://github.com/BrockTimetable/BrockVisualTimetable/blob/master/docs/TimetableGeneration.md - timetable generation notes

Trust signals:
- Open source and publicly auditable on GitHub.
- Used by about 3.8k students in 2025
- Designed for planning; students should verify final schedules in official Brock systems.

Data and affiliation:
- Course data is provided by the project backend and is not a public unauthenticated API.
- Students should verify schedules in official Brock systems before registering.
- This project is student-built and is not affiliated with Brock University.
